title: object.changed event params
description: Sent by the engine over the wire when an object's properties change, e.g. after object.setProperty is accepted. Introduced in protocol version 0.2. properties is a snapshot copy of the object's property bag (DTO, never a live engine pointer).

objectId.description: Opaque identifier of the object that changed.

properties.description: Snapshot copy of the object's current property bag.

kind.description: Optional generic object classification (free-form, not a NorvesLib type name).
